  GeneratedSources: [
    {
      HintName: PaymentMethod.g.cs,
      Content:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

namespace TestNamespace
{
    partial class PaymentMethod
    {
        private static readonly Dictionary<int, PaymentMethod> _byId = new Dictionary<int, PaymentMethod>()
        {
            [1] = CreditCard,
            [2] = DebitCard,
        };

        private static readonly Dictionary<string, PaymentMethod> _byName = new Dictionary<string, PaymentMethod>()
        {
            ["Credit Card"] = CreditCard,
            ["Debit Card"] = DebitCard,
        };

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets all values of PaymentMethod ordered by ID.
        /// </summary>
        public static IReadOnlyCollection<PaymentMethod> GetAll() => _byId.Values;

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets the PaymentMethod instance from its ID value.
        /// </summary>
        public static PaymentMethod FromValue(int id)
        {
            if (_byId.TryGetValue(id, out var result))
                return result;
            throw new InvalidOperationException($"No PaymentMethod with Id {id} found.");
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets the PaymentMethod instance from its name.
        /// </summary>
        public static PaymentMethod FromName(string name)
        {
            if (_byName.TryGetValue(name, out var result))
                return result;
            throw new InvalidOperationException($"No PaymentMethod with name '{name}' found.");
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Tries to get the PaymentMethod instance from its ID value.
        /// </summary>
        public static bool TryFromValue(int id, out PaymentMethod? result)
        {
            return _byId.TryGetValue(id, out result);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Tries to get the PaymentMethod instance from its name.
        /// </summary>
        public static bool TryFromName(string name, out PaymentMethod? result)
        {
            return _byName.TryGetValue(name, out result);
        }

    }

#if NET6_0_OR_GREATER
    public class PaymentMethodJsonConverter : System.Text.Json.Serialization.JsonConverter<PaymentMethod>
    {
        public override PaymentMethod? Read(ref System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonReader reader, Type typeToConvert, System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions options)
        {
            if (reader.TokenType == System.Text.Json.JsonTokenType.Number && reader.TryGetInt32(out var id))
            {
                return PaymentMethod.TryFromValue(id, out var result) ? result : null;
            }
            if (reader.TokenType == System.Text.Json.JsonTokenType.String)
            {
                var name = reader.GetString();
                return name != null && PaymentMethod.TryFromName(name, out var result) ? result : null;
            }
            return null;
        }

        public override void Write(System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonWriter writer, PaymentMethod value, System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions options)
        {
            writer.WriteNumberValue(value.Id);
        }
    }
#endif
}

    }
  ]
}
